introSection: Pioneer is a steel part-motorbike roller coaster located at OK Corral in Cuges-les-Pins, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Pioneer opened in 2018, at the time, it did not have a station roof. This was later added in 2020.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The first 3 rows of both trains are equipped with motorbike seating while the last 3 rows are equipped with traditional sit-down seating.

fullText:
Pioneer is a steel part-motorbike roller coaster located at OK Corral in Cuges-les-Pins, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

Pioneer opened in 2018, at the time, it did not have a station roof. This was later added in 2020.



The first 3 rows of both trains are equipped with motorbike seating while the last 3 rows are equipped with traditional sit-down seating.
